name: Fever Live Entertainment Events API
what_it_does: Fever live entertainment events distribution REST API for travel platforms, hospitality brands, and entertainment apps to access and promote curated live events, immersive experiences, pop-up shows, food festivals, and cultural activities in 80+ cities worldwide through Fever's AI-driven event curation and distribution network, including branded event production (Candlelight concerts, Stranger Things experience). Enables AI agents to manage event discovery for city entertainment search automation, handle event booking for immersive experience reservation automation, access ticket availability for live entertainment slot automation, retrieve event catalog for local entertainment discovery automation, manage booking confirmation for event reservation automation, handle affiliate link generation for event monetization automation, access event category filtering for entertainment type automation, retrieve pricing and package for event ticket automation, manage cancellation for experience reversal automation, and integrate Fever with travel apps, hotel concierge, and entertainment platforms for end-to-end live event booking automation.
use_cases: Discovering and booking immersive local events for hotel and travel concierge automation agents
Embedding curated city entertainment in travel itinerary planning automation agents
Booking Fever-produced events (Candlelight, immersive shows) for experience platform agents
Generating affiliate event links for city guide and entertainment content monetization agents
not_for: Major concert and sports ticketing (use Ticketmaster or SeatGeek for mainstream events)
Corporate event management and MICE (Fever is consumer entertainment not B2B events)
On-demand event creation (Fever is curated inventory not custom event platform)
best_when: A travel platform, hotel concierge, or entertainment app wanting AI agents to discover and book curated immersive experiences and live events from Fever's 80+ city entertainment network with AI-matched event discovery.
avoid_when: PARTNER API REQUIRES FEVER COMMERCIAL AGREEMENT: Fever partner API requires formal commercial relationship; automated self-service API access creates no partner credentials; automated standalone integration creates affiliate-only access not booking API. EVENTS ARE CITY-SPECIFIC AND DATE-BOUND: Fever events are city-specific with specific dates and limited availability; automated cross-city event search without city parameter creates overly broad results; automated date-flexible search must handle sold-out event responses. FEVER PRODUCTIONS ARE PROPRIETARY CONTENT: Fever-produced events (Candlelight concerts, branded experiences) have content licensing restrictions; automated reuse of event descriptions and images outside approved context creates IP violation. TICKET DELIVERY IS MOBILE QR CODE: Fever tickets are delivered as mobile QR codes; automated print-at-home assumption creates incompatible format at venue scanning.

auth.notes: Fever uses API key for partner authentication. REST API with JSON. New York/Madrid HQ. Founded 2014 by Ignacio Bachiller. Backed by Goldman Sachs, Rakuten, Atresmedia ($430M+ raised). Products: Curated event discovery, Candlelight concerts, immersive experiences, pop-up events. SDKs: None public. GDPR, CCPA. 40M+ users in 80+ cities. AI-powered event recommendation. Competes with TimeOut and Eventbrite for curated local event distribution.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Partner program required; no self-service developer tier
pricing.paid_tiers: Revenue share negotiated; partner commission per ticket sold; Fever-produced events have set wholesale pricing
pricing.notes: New York/Madrid. Goldman Sachs/Rakuten backed. Revenue share partner model. GDPR/CCPA.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; event search and booking throttled; webhooks for booking events

known_agent_gotchas: CITY PARAMETER REQUIRED FOR RELEVANT RESULTS: Fever events are hyper-local city-specific; automated event search without city parameter creates irrelevant cross-city results; automated search must specify city or location to get relevant local events

PARTNER PROGRAM GATES BOOKING API: Fever booking API requires commercial partnership; automated developer self-service booking creates affiliate-redirect-only access; automated full booking requires formal Fever partner agreement

MOBILE QR CODE IS ONLY TICKET FORMAT: Fever tickets are mobile-only QR codes; automated print-at-home or PDF delivery creates incompatible ticket format; automated ticket delivery must direct user to Fever mobile app for QR code retrieval

EVENT CONTENT IS PROPRIETARY: Fever-produced event imagery and descriptions are proprietary; automated content reuse outside approved partner context creates IP exposure; automated content display requires Fever partner content licensing

AVAILABILITY CHANGES RAPIDLY FOR POPULAR EVENTS: Fever immersive experiences sell out quickly; automated booking without real-time availability check creates sold-out binding attempt; automated availability must be checked at booking initiation
agent_readiness.security_notes: Live events platform. GDPR, CCPA. API key. US/EU. Event booking and user preference data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Event ticketing. GDPR, CCPA. API key. US/EU. Booking and user preference data.
